_comment: HME RAG configuration — migrated from the former mcpServers.HME block in .mcp.json. Owned by the HME worker (file_walker.py + rag_engine). Fields: ragIndexDirs (explicit allowlist, ONLY these dirs are indexed), ragIgnoreDirs (merged with DEFAULT_IGNORE_DIRS), ragIgnore (pathspec glob list), ragLibs (external library configs), ragMaxFileSize (KB).
